exact_text: Designed and validated a portable openFDA data platform across GCP BigQuery, Microsoft Fabric, and AWS serverless services, using shared versioned contracts and cross-cloud reconciliation to preserve schema, record counts, and business metrics across cloud-native implementations.

phrases.phrase: portable openFDA platform across GCP BigQuery

phrases.proof: openFDA injected to OneLake (deltalake), reconciled GCP==Fabric 300/156/408; card03_portability_proof
DynamoDB PAY_PER_REQUEST (no RDS/OpenSearch/ECS/always-on), 300 items loaded from the shared contract
openfda_fact_contract_v1.0.0 — same schema drives all 3 cloud loads
GCP==AWS serious_rate 0.6833 (match), serious_count + total_reactions match exactly

honesty: AWS leg = DynamoDB on-demand serverless (Card 05 constraints honored). Reconciliation = exact metric equality across clouds, real runs. 'validated' = counts+metrics match, not a live enterprise migration.
verdict: CLAIM APPROVED — openFDA reconciles exactly across GCP/Fabric/AWS via one shared contract
